page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web service provides unified access to several databases housed at EBI/Sanger such as Ensembl Vertebrates, Ensembl Bacteria, Ensembl Protists, Ensembl Metazoa, Ensembl Variation, Ensembl Vega, Uniprot, PRIDE, HGNC & EU Rat Mart.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web service provides unified access to several databases housed at EBI/Sanger such as Ensembl Vertebrates, Ensembl Bacteria, Ensembl Protists, Ensembl Metazoa, Ensembl Variation, Ensembl Vega, Uniprot, PRIDE, HGNC & EU Rat Mart.
